name: The Broken Mechanism
premise: An ancient door mechanism is jammed. The corridor beyond holds your escape, but only the right tool can fix the mechanism.
goal: Find the iron wrench and repair the mechanism to open the path forward.

interactiveObjects.idleMessage: Inside the dusty chest you find a heavy iron wrench.

wrench.responseText: The mechanism clicks into place. The corridor door swings open.

gold-coin.responseText: That won't work on this mechanism. You need a proper tool.

interactiveObjects.idleMessage: A complex mechanical lock. It looks like it needs a tool.
